title: Marbella Private Boat Hire Fishing: Costs and Guide 2026
html:
Private boat hire for fishing in Marbella offers an exceptional way to explore the Costa del Sol's rich marine life, with trips departing from Puerto Banús or Marbella Marina typically costing from €600 for a half-day charter. BoatHire24 connects you with verified skippers and vessels for a bespoke angling experience on the Mediterranean Sea.

How much does it cost to rent a fishing boat in Marbella?

Half-day private fishing charters start from €650 for up to six guests, while full-day trips range from €1,100 to €2,500. Prices vary by boat size, crew, and season. A shared fishing tour costs around €120 per person for a half-day experience. For a luxury yacht such as a Sunseeker 60, expect to pay from €3,500 for a full day with a professional skipper. To compare verified boat listings, use the BoatHire24 platform to find the best value. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most private fishing hires depart from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina known for its superyachts and excellent facilities. Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella) offers a more local departure point with easy parking and access to the fishing grounds. The port of Cabopino, just east of Marbella, is a quiet alternative with direct access to the Cabopino Marine Reserve. Other departure options include the coastal towns of Estepona to the west and Fuengirola to the east, both with well-equipped marinas and good fishing spots around the bay.

Which boat to rent for fishing in Marbella

  1. Motor fishing boat (6, 8 m), best for small groups of up to 4 anglers, from €600 half-day.
  2. Medium motor yacht (10, 14 m), ideal for up to 8 guests, including a Fairline or Azimut, from €1,200 half-day.
  3. Luxury crewed yacht (20, 30 m), perfect for a premium fishing excursion with full amenities, such as the Maiora 26m, from €3,000 full-day. See this luxury yacht for details.
  4. Catamaran (12, 18 m), stable platform for family fishing trips, accommodating up to 12, from €1,800 full-day.
  5. Skippered rib or open boat (7, 9 m), nimble for trolling and jigging, for up to 6 guests, from €800 half-day.

Fishing boat rental prices in Marbella

  • Shared fishing tour: from €120 per person half-day.
  • Small motorboat (up to 6 guests): from €650 half-day.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): from €2,200.
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day (up to 8 guests): from €3,500.

Do you need a licence to rent a fishing boat in Marbella?

No, you do not need a licence if you hire a boat with a skipper, which is standard for private fishing charters. The skipper holds the required Spanish qualifications and knows the best local fishing spots. If you wish to drive a boat yourself, you need a Spanish recreational boating licence (PER) or an equivalent international certificate; the operator will confirm exact requirements. In high season (June to September), the Poniente wind can affect sea conditions, so morning departures are often calmer.

For the best catch, ask your skipper to head toward the Cabopino Marine Reserve, about 5 nautical miles east, where bream and sea bass are plentiful.

At a glance

  • Price band per half-day: €600, €3,500
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Maximum guests: 4, 12 depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I keep the fish I catch on a Marbella charter?

Yes, you are generally welcome to keep your catch, subject to local size and bag limits, and the skipper can advise on regulations.

What type of fishing gear is provided on Marbella boat hires?

Most crewed charters include rods, reels, and bait, but it is best to confirm with the operator when booking through BoatHire24.

Are fishing boat rentals in Marbella suitable for beginners?

Absolutely, skippers are experienced in teaching beginners the basics of trolling and bottom fishing in the Mediterranean.

What is the best time of day for fishing in Marbella?

Early morning from 7 am to 11 am and late afternoon from 4 pm to sunset typically yield the best catches during the summer months.

Whether you are an experienced angler or a first-timer, private boat hire fishing in Marbella gives you direct access to the rich waters of the Mediterranean. After your trip, consider if you own a vessel and want to list a boat for free on the BoatHire24 marketplace to earn income from charters.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
